videos.headline: Cade Klubnik uncorks 30-yard dime for Clemson TD
videos.description: Cade Klubnik finds Antonio Williams open downfield and rips a 30-yard touchdown pass to put Clemson ahead early.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik uncorks 30-yard dime for Clemson TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Big man pick-six! Clemson's DT rumbles down sideline for TD
videos.description: Clemson's defensive tackle Payton Page snags an interception and takes it to the house for a 57-yard pick-six against The Citadel.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Big man pick-six! Clemson's DT rumbles down sideline for TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson crosses 50-point mark on Barrett Carter's TD run
videos.description: Barrett Carter barrels into the end zone and pushes Clemson over the 50-point mark against The Citadel.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson crosses 50-point mark on Barrett Carter's TD run) 2024/11/23 ESHEET
